chapter_title.en: Chapter 51 – The truthfulness and the repayment of the entrustments

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (183/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (183/ 8)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَبِي يَعْفُورٍ يُقْرِئُكَ السَّلَامَ قَالَ عَلَيْكَ وَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ إِذَا أَتَيْتَ عَبْدَ اللَّهِ فَأَقْرِئْهُ السَّلَامَ وَ قُلْ لَهُ إِنَّ جَعْفَرَ بْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ يَقُولُ لَكَ انْظُرْ مَا بَلَغَ بِهِ عَلِيٌّ ( عليه السلام ) عِنْدَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَالْزَمْهُ فَإِنَّ عَلِيّاً ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّمَا بَلَغَ مَا بَلَغَ بِهِ عِنْدَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) بِصِدْقِ الْحَدِيثِ وَ أَدَاءِ الْأَمَانَةِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Abu Kahmasy who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>, ‘Abdullah Bin Abu Yafour conveys the greetings to you<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>’. So he<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> said: ‘And upon him be the greetings. When you go to Abdullah, so convey the greetings and say to him that Ja’far<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> Bin Muhammad<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> is saying to you: ‘Look at what Ali<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> reached with in the presence of Rasool-Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup>, so necessitate it, for Ali<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>, rather, reached whatever he<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> reached with in the presence of Rasool-Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> by truthful narrations and repayment of the entrustments’.
en.sarwar: 5. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from al-Hassan ibn Mahbub from abu Kahmas who has said the following: “Once I said to abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) “Abd Allah ibn abu Ya’fur has sent you ( salam ) greetings.’ The Imam said, ‘May salam (peace) be with you and with him. If you meet ‘Abd Allah convey salam to him and say, ‘Ja’far, son of Muhammad, says to you, “Consider to what level Ali (Amir al-Mu’minin ibn abu Talib) had reached before the Messenger of Allah. You must follow his manners. Ali (a.s.) reached the level that he reached before the Messenger of Allah because of the truthfulness in his words and his trustworthiness in returning the trust.’””
